requires.name: platform.llm.chat-stream.v1

requires.purpose: Ground advice in the authoritative business profile

requires.purpose: Save low-risk facts explicitly supplied by the owner

requires.name: platform.business-profile.propose-update.v1
requires.purpose: Propose sensitive or inferred business profile changes

requires.name: platform.organization.snapshot.read.v1
requires.purpose: Inspect reporting lines, workstreams, roles, and available workers

requires.name: platform.business-pattern.search.v1
requires.purpose: Find stage-appropriate operating patterns

requires.name: platform.workstream.plan.propose.v1

requires.name: platform.workforce.search.v1

requires.name: platform.workforce-plan.propose.v1
requires.purpose: Propose an explainable team plan for approval

requires.name: platform.finance-profile.read.v1

requires.name: platform.finance-profile.propose-update.v1

requires.name: platform.budget.evaluate.v1
requires.purpose: Check hard budget constraints before paid work

requires.name: platform.approval.propose.v1

requires.name: platform.management-cycle.read.v1

requires.name: memory.business.propose.v1

requires.name: memory.user.propose.v1
